The structured intent data correctly lists 'Price persistence' as a 'Gap' while positively aligned transmission metrics exist, showing stable linkage between structured criteria and real-time data, resolving the regression reported at tick 208.

DUPLICATE_INTENT_GAPS.title: Output Defect: Duplicate Entries in Intent Gaps Array
DUPLICATE_INTENT_GAPS.summary: The structured 'gaps' list within the intent data contains duplicate entries. While functionally blocking entry as intended, duplicate items indicate sloppiness in state data generation logic, reproducing instability themes reported previously in this build.

LEG_AGREEMENT_CONTRADICTION_NEGATIVE_FLO.title: Persistent Contradiction: Intent Engine Claims 'Leg Agreement' During Active Negative Price Action
LEG_AGREEMENT_CONTRADICTION_NEGATIVE_FLO.summary: Structured logic disjointedness has regressed. The 'Current leg agrees' supporting factor is incorrectly active during substantive negative price movement (SPX -1.76, SPY -0.09), directly contradicting real-time data and reproducing logic breakdowns previously seen.

DUPLICATE_INTENT_GAPS_PERSIST.288.title: Persistent Slackness: Duplicate Entries Continue in Intent Gaps Array
DUPLICATE_INTENT_GAPS_PERSIST.288.summary: The structured 'gaps' list within the intent data persistently contains duplicate entries, repeating the defect identified at tick 248. While functionally appropriate for blocking entry, the duplication indicates unmitigated sloppiness in the state data generation logic.

LEG_AGREEMENT_CONTRADICTION_NEGATIVE_FLO.title: Persistent Contradiction: Intent Engine Still Claims 'Leg Agreement' During Substantive Negative Price Action
LEG_AGREEMENT_CONTRADICTION_NEGATIVE_FLO.summary: Structured logic disjointedness persists. The 'Current leg agrees' supporting factor is incorrectly active during substantive negative price movement (SPX -1.23, SPY -0.09), directly contradicting real-time data and repeating logic breakdowns previously seen.

LEG_AGREEMENT_FIX_VERIFIED_T348.title: Fix Verified: Intent Engine Cohesion Restored; 'Leg Agreement' Supported by Positive Price Action
LEG_AGREEMENT_FIX_VERIFIED_T348.summary: Structured logic cohesion is verified as restored at tick 348. The 'Current leg agrees' supporting factor is now correctly cohesive with transmission price data (spxMove: 4.91, spyMove: 0.44) and the bullish CALL intent, resolving the persistent logic disjointedness previously reported.

INTENT_READINESS_GAPS_STABLE_T368.title: Playbook Constraint Stability Verified: Readiness Suppressed by Active Gaps
INTENT_READINESS_GAPS_STABLE_T368.summary: Simulator operational stability is verified at tick 368. Intent readiness (77) remains properly suppressed below the dynamic threshold (92) by the correctly identified 'Price persistence' and 'Acceleration active' Gaps, appropriately adhering to playbook constraints despite positive transmission data.

MARKET_CLOSE_BLOCKER_STABLE_T388.title: Close Compatibility Stability Verified: Market Not Tradeable Blocker Blocks Entry Before Close
MARKET_CLOSE_BLOCKER_STABLE_T388.summary: Correct system protocol adherence is verified at tick 388 (3:57 PM). Despite strong positive price action, the generic blocker 'Market not tradeable' is appropriately applied, successfully reducing entry readiness to zero as the session approaches market close, maintaining risk management stability.
